taxonomy: Cucullaria citrifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The classification of Cucullaria citrifolia is as follows: it is placed in the genus Cucullaria and in the family Gentianaceae. This classification makes Cucullaria citrifolia a member of the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. The exact classification can be further divided into its kingdom and phylum classification, which places it in the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta.
